ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Continued To Oct-04-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this is on for status of filing a petition for final distribution, that an Order to Appear was issued on 8/9/16 for appearance today, that it will continue the status of filing a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of status report to October 4, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with a new Order to Appear indicating that the Administrator will be removed unless the petition is filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Continued To Oct-04-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-09-2016 Continued To Sep-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on September 6, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed and why no one appeared at today's hearing. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not reported)
